hero.title: Find Your Perfect Ski & Snowboard Instructor
hero.subtitle: Connect with certified instructors across Niseko, Rusutsu & Kiroro. Match by language, skill level, and areas to improve.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1: Choose your preferences: teaching language, skill level, and areas to improve
howItWorks.step2: Browse instructor profiles that match your needs
howItWorks.step3: Book a lesson and hit the slopes

auth.signUpSuccess: Account created. Please check your email to confirm.
auth.wrongLoginTypeStudent: This account is for instructors. Please use Instructor Login.
auth.wrongLoginTypeInstructor: This account is for students. Please use Student Login.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Reset your password
forgotPasswordPage.success: Check your email for a link to reset your password. If it doesn't appear within a few minutes, check your spam folder.
forgotPasswordPage.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.success: Your password has been updated. Redirecting to your account...
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.

signup.chooseRole: How will you use Powder Match?
signup.studentCardDesc: Find certified instructors and book ski or snowboard lessons.
signup.instructorCardDesc: Set your availability and connect with students who need lessons.
signup.success: Account created! Check your email to confirm, then log in.
signup.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

booking.title: Book a lesson with
booking.messagePlaceholder: Tell the instructor about your goals, skill level, or any questions.
booking.success: Request sent! You can track it in your student dashboard.
booking.loginRequired: You need to be logged in as a student to book.
booking.studentRequired: Only student accounts can send booking requests.
booking.error: Failed to send request. Please try again.

user.placeholder: This page will be tailored with more features later.

student.placeholder: Student dashboard – more features coming soon.
student.cancelError: Could not cancel the request. Please try again.

instructor.placeholder: Instructor dashboard – more features coming soon.

profile.title: Teaching Schedule
profile.subtitle: Add availability blocks — each one covers a date range and specifies what you can teach on those dates.
profile.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
profile.seedWarningTitle: Reference data not set up yet.
profile.seedWarningBody: The options shown (Ski, Kiroro, etc.) are placeholders and cannot be saved. Please run the seed SQL in your Supabase SQL Editor to set up real data, then reload this page.
